fields.acceptance_criteria: 1) Rust TicketSummary struct in ticket-http/src/serve/handlers/tickets.rs gains created_at: DateTime<Utc> field. 2) List handler maps created_at from IndexedTicket (already available). 3) Search handler also populates created_at. 4) Frontend TicketSummary type in ticket-viewer/frontend/src/types.ts gains created_at: string field. 5) No breaking changes to existing consumers (created_at is additive).
